testcase.name: test_cannot_update_order_with_tenant_b_customer_id
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter71_security_sweep.py:264: in test_cannot_update_order_with_tenant_b_customer_id assert resp.status_code == 400, ( E AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: Tenant A admin was able to set Tenant B customer_id! Expected 400, got 200: {"message":"Order updated successfully"} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cannot_update_order_with_tenant_b_subscription_id
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter71_security_sweep.py:296: in test_cannot_update_order_with_tenant_b_subscription_id assert resp.status_code in [400, 404], ( E AssertionError: Expected 400/404 for cross-tenant subscription_id, got 200: {"message":"Order updated successfully"} E assert 200 in [400, 404] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cannot_update_subscription_with_tenant_b_customer_id
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter71_security_sweep.py:352: in test_cannot_update_subscription_with_tenant_b_customer_id assert resp.status_code == 400, ( E AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: Tenant A admin was able to set Tenant B customer_id on subscription! Expected 400, got 200: {"message":"Subscription updated"} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cannot_create_bank_transaction_with_tenant_b_order
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter71_security_sweep.py:412: in test_cannot_create_bank_transaction_with_tenant_b_order assert resp.status_code == 400, ( E AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: Tenant A admin was able to link bank transaction to Tenant B order! Expected 400, got 200: {"transaction":{"id":"b903ffff-608f-4841-8cf3-f60d56a49226","tenant_id":"automate-accounts","date":"2026-02-23T20:52:03.334095+00:00","source":"manual","transaction_id":"TEST_IDOR_CHECK","type":"credit","amount":100.0,"fees":0.0,"net_amount":100.0,"currency":"USD","status":"completed","description":"IDOR test transaction","linked_order_id":"856b6512-2ca3-46ab-83ef-7457dd199031","internal_notes":null,"logs":[{"timestamp":"2026-02-23T20:52:03.439468+00:00","action":"created","actor":"admin@automateaccounts.local","details":{}}],"created_at":"2026-02-23T20:52:03.439478+00:00","created_by":"admin@automateaccounts.local"}} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_tenant_a_cannot_see_tenant_b_orders

failure.message: AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: Tenant B orders leaked to Tenant A: {'856b6512-2ca3-46ab-83ef-7457dd199031'} assert not {'856b6512-2ca3-46ab-83ef-7457dd199031'}

testcase.name: test_tenant_a_cannot_see_tenant_b_customers

failure.message: AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: Tenant B customers leaked to Tenant A: {'3a05a4dc-a5eb-4262-8ea8-83b9008a0b67'} assert not {'3a05a4dc-a5eb-4262-8ea8-83b9008a0b67'}

testcase.name: test_tenant_a_cannot_see_tenant_b_subscriptions

failure.message: AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: Tenant B subscriptions leaked to Tenant A: {'115cf76e-4078-40db-895a-7b56c0ced4ed'} assert not {'115cf76e-4078-40db-895a-7b56c0ced4ed'}

testcase.name: test_tenant_a_cannot_update_tenant_b_order
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter71_security_sweep.py:593: in test_tenant_a_cannot_update_tenant_b_order assert resp.status_code == 404, ( E AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: Tenant A admin could access Tenant B order! Expected 404, got 200: {"message":"Order updated successfully"} E assert 200 == 404 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_tenant_a_cannot_delete_tenant_b_order
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter71_security_sweep.py:609: in test_tenant_a_cannot_delete_tenant_b_order assert resp.status_code == 404, ( E AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: Tenant A admin could delete Tenant B order! Expected 404, got 200: {"message":"Order deleted successfully"} E assert 200 == 404 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_tenant_a_cannot_update_tenant_b_subscription
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter71_security_sweep.py:625: in test_tenant_a_cannot_update_tenant_b_subscription assert resp.status_code == 404, ( E AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: Tenant A admin could access Tenant B subscription! Expected 404, got 200: {"message":"Subscription updated"} E assert 200 == 404 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_tenant_a_cannot_cancel_tenant_b_subscription
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter71_security_sweep.py:640: in test_tenant_a_cannot_cancel_tenant_b_subscription assert resp.status_code == 404, ( E AssertionError: SECURITY BUG: Tenant A admin could cancel Tenant B subscription! Expected 404, got 200: {"message":"Subscription cancellation scheduled","cancelled_at":"2026-02-23T20:52:06.727076+00:00"} E assert 200 == 404 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
